race.description: Greenway Turf Solutions Country Maiden Plate
race.comment: INCHYRA (6) returns from a lengthy break after running some sound minor placings last time in. Fitted with the one solid trial victory over 900m at Canberra. Well drawn for this and can assert her class today. STORMY REIGN (12) returned in good style with a narrow second over 1000m at Canberra in a strong rating contest. Well in again with the claim and will prove hard to stop. TEXAN STAR (3) returns after eight months in the paddock. Good debut run when third over this trip at Moruya. Failed to fire in two runs since and wasn't asked to do much in his latest trial over 800m at Goulburn. Each-way. ON THE FLY (10) well in the market at debut when covered ground for a tiring ninth over 1000m at Canberra in a Federal Maiden. Claim helps and expected to run a much better race today.
